---
title = "*Calepin* Tutorial (PDF)"
date = "2026-03-19"
abstract = """
This document renders the *Calepin* tutorial to PDF via LaTeX. It demonstrates \
scholarly front matter (authors, affiliations, ORCID), the appendix, and the \
`include` directive for pulling in content from another file."""
license = "CC BY"
format = "latex"
bibliography = "assets/library.bib"

[[author]]
name = "Vincent Arel-Bundock"
corresponding = true

[[author.affiliations]]
name = "Université de Montréal"
department = "Department of Political Science"
city = "Montreal"
country = "Canada"

[[author]]
name = "Norah Jones"
email = "norah@example.com"
orcid = "0000-0003-1689-0557"

[[author.affiliations]]
name = "Carnegie Mellon University"
department = "Machine Learning"
city = "Pittsburgh"
region = "PA"
country = "USA"

[[author.affiliations]]
name = "University of Chicago"
city = "Chicago"
region = "IL"
country = "USA"

[copyright]
holder = "Vincent Arel-Bundock"
year = 2026

[citation]
type = "article-journal"
container-title = "Journal of Reproducible Research"
volume = 1
issue = 1
issued = "2026-03"
doi = "10.1234/calepin.2026"

[[funding]]
source = "Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council"
award = "Grant #123456"
recipient = "Vincent Arel-Bundock"
---

{% include "../basics.qmd" %}
